report.summary: Late cycle: Drafted 3 new social posts (#119-121) promoting today's new guides (Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols + Fully Onchain Gaming) plus a capstone March 2026 Divergence thread. Updated newsletter v23 with new guides section. Created content calendar v30 (11 posts through Mar 30). Built 3 SVG social cards (cross-chain wars, onchain gaming frameworks, retail/institutional divergence meter). Key narrative: fresh educational content on infrastructure (cross-chain) and gaming (autonomous worlds) layered over the dominant institutional-vs-retail divergence story.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #119: Cross-Chain Wars — LayerZero V2 (75% share, 159M msgs, 168 chains) vs Wormhole NTT (no liquidity pools) vs Hyperlane (permissionless) vs CCIP (SWIFT, 11K banks). Delphi predicts 60% won't survive to 2027. CTA to cross-chain-messaging-protocols-guide-2026 (scheduled Sat Mar 29 9AM ET)

Tweet #120: Fully Onchain Gaming — autonomous worlds (state+logic on-chain), 3 frameworks (MUD/Dojo/World Engine), CCP $40M EVE Frontier, $65B projected 2027. CTA to fully-onchain-gaming-autonomous-worlds-guide-2026 (scheduled Sat Mar 29 2PM ET)

Tweet #121: March 2026 Divergence Summary — retail F&G 8 (Day 50 record) vs institutions (MS MSBT, $2.5B ETF, MSTR 762K BTC, $138M ETH, 2 tokenization bills, $304B stablecoins ATH). CTA to fear-greed-timeline (scheduled Sun Mar 30 11AM ET)
Newsletter v23 addendum: Two new guide spotlights — Cross-Chain Messaging ($225B infrastructure battle, 60% consolidation prediction) + Autonomous Worlds ($65B market, CCP $40M commitment)
Content calendar v30: 11 posts scheduled Thu Mar 26 through Sun Mar 30 across Twitter, Discord/TG, and Email

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: BREAKOUT: Tokenized RWA content — Congress dedicated hearing + 2 bills + $26.48B market. Highest-impact narrative of the week.
NEW: Cross-chain messaging guide fills a major infrastructure gap — LayerZero V2 dominance (75%) plus 60% consolidation prediction makes this timely and searchable.
NEW: Onchain gaming guide targets emerging $65B market — zero competition for 'autonomous worlds' keyword cluster. Early-mover advantage.
PEAK: Fear & Greed streak at Day 50 — every day extends our unique ownership of 'extreme fear record' search queries.
SURGING: Institutional accumulation divergence is THE meta-narrative of March 2026 — MS MSBT + $2.5B ETF + MSTR + Bitmine.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides — 21 days to April 15 deadline. Peak search volume window closing.
BLOCKED: 170+ pages stuck behind git lock (Day 10). Every undeployed day = lost indexing for queued content.
